settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Basic options for theme, language, and window behavior
settings.languageHint: Chinese and English are supported by default. You can also create translation files for additional languages yourself.
settings.closeHint: Clicking the window close button will exit the program directly.

clean.title: Windows Cleaner Next
clean.subtitle: Choose tools to clean the system
clean.scriptPlaceholder:
Write a .bat script
Example: clean_user_paths.exe D:\Cache
    clean_user_paths.exe E:\Temp
clean.readyHint: Ready. Select tools and click "Run selected".

tools.title: Utilities
tools.subtitle: System maintenance and helper tools
tools.memDesc: Command-line memory cleanup tool. Put it into the Tools folder after downloading, then use it on the Cleaning page.
tools.spaceDesc: Disk space analysis tool. Only provides a download link and is useful for finding the largest folders first.
tools.openDirDesc: Open the folder where program tools are stored, so you can place or manage executables manually.
tools.linkDesc: Move a file or folder from one drive to another and create a link at the original location so dependent software keeps working without configuration changes.

about.title: About
about.alreadyLatestDetail: Current version {current} is already the latest.
about.devBuildDetail: Current version {current} is a development build. It cannot be updated.
about.checkFailedDetail: Unable to get the latest version information: {error}

dialog.title: Tip
dialog.samePresetExists: A preset with the same name already exists.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.subtitle: System power, memory, and cleaning preset management
advanced.hibernateDesc: Enable or disable system hibernation. Disabling it can save disk space by removing hiberfil.sys, but hibernation will no longer be available.
advanced.vmDesc:
View the current page file configuration. Adjust it manually from Windows Settings for better safety.
Path: System Properties → Advanced → Performance → Settings → Advanced → Virtual memory → Change
advanced.presetDesc: Manage the cleaning presets saved in settings here. The active preset will sync to the main screen's “Recommended Clean” dropdown.
advanced.presetHint: Only the checked state is saved; “Recommended Clean” is also a preset name.

cleanMemory.name: Memory cleanup
cleanMemory.desc: Free system working set and file cache (Mem Reduct)

cleanUserPaths.name: Custom script
cleanUserPaths.desc: Write a bat script for custom cleanup

cleanTmpFiles.name: TMP files
cleanTmpFiles.desc: Scan and delete .tmp/.cache/.msp files in C:\
